title: Kodi Kodi Minnalgal Lyrics Jayam
stanzas:
Kodi kodi minnalgal
oadi vandhu paayudhe
yaenadi yaenadi yaenadi

oadi vandha vaarthaigal
oasai indri thaeyudhe
yaenadi yaenadi yaenadi

moochile pudhu vaasanai
idhu yaenammaa
ilaiya manadhil kaadhal
pirandha neramaa.

Kodi kodi minnalgal
oadi vandhu paayudhe
yaenadi yaenadi yaenadi

saaral vizhum neram
vaanavillai pole
thondridum azhagaana kadhal.

oasai indru vandhu
ullukkule vaazhum
ilamaiyin sangeetham kadhal.

rail-in oasai ingae
suga naadha swarangal aaga.
idhayam irandum
inaindhu oadumaa.

azhagu paadham paarthu
avan suppra paadham
paada sinungum kolusu
shruthi serkkumaa

Kodi kodi minnalgal
oadi vandhu paayudhe
yaenadi yaenadi yaenadi

thendral ena vandhu
thottu sendra kaadhal
kalandhatho moochodu indru

kadhal ennum vaarthai
adhu vaarthai alla vazhkai.
vazhndhu paarthu
nee sollammaa.

inaiya vendum manadhu
idhu iraivan seidha mudivu
maatri kolla maalai vendumaa.

Kodi kodi minnalgal
oadi vandhu paayudhe
yaenadi yaenadi yaenadi

oadi vandha vaarthaigal
oasai indri thaeyudhe
yaenadi yaenadi yaenadi

moochile pudhu vaasanai
idhu yaenammaa
ilaiya manadhil kaadhal
pirandha neramaa.

Kodi kodi minnalgal
oadi vandhu paayudhe
yaenadi yaenadi yaenadi

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of Kodi Kodi Minnalgal?

The song captures the excitement and energy of newfound love, with a romantic and happy vibe.

Who is the singer of Kodi Kodi Minnalgal?

The song is sung by Vijay Yesudas.

Who composed the music for Jayam?

The music for the movie Jayam was composed by Patnaik.

What is the release year of the movie Jayam?

The movie Jayam was released in 2003.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Jayam, Kodi Kodi Minnalgal is a vibrant and romantic song that beautifully portrays the thrill of young love. The lyrics express the excitement and joy of a blossoming relationship. Vijay Yesudas's captivating voice, paired with Patnaik's melodic composition, evokes a sense of happiness and energy. This song perfectly captures the essence of romance and is a favorite for celebrations and special occasions.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the electrifying romance with Kodi Kodi Minnalgal from the movie Jayam. Vijay Yesudas's soulful voice combined with Patnaik's melodious composition creates a magical atmosphere. Dive into this enchanting melody that captures the essence of love and excitement.
stanzaMeanings: Many flashes of lightning are rushing and jumping, why, why, why?
Words that came running are fading without sound, why, why, why?
There's a new fragrance in the breath, why, dear? Is it the time when love is born in a young heart?
Many flashes of lightning are rushing and jumping, why, why, why?
When the drizzle falls, beautiful love appears like a rainbow.
A sound has come today, living inside, it's the music of youth, love.
The sound of the train here becomes sweet musical notes. Will both hearts join and run together?
Looking at the beautiful feet, the anklet jingles in tune with the rhythm.
Many flashes of lightning are rushing and jumping, why, why, why?
Did the glance from the corner of the eye light up the lamps in the heart today?
Did the love that came like a breeze touch and blend with the breath today?
The word 'love' is not just a word, it's life. Live and see, then tell me.
The heart needs a pair, this is God's decision. Do you need a garland to change it?
Many flashes of lightning are rushing and jumping, why, why, why?
Words that came running are fading without sound, why, why, why?
There's a new fragrance in the breath, why, dear? Is it the time when love is born in a young heart?
Many flashes of lightning are rushing and jumping, why, why, why?
